Formula: Number(value), if not finite -> 0
Описание логики расчета: Любое числовое поле сначала приводится к числу. Если брокер оставил поле пустым или значение не число, калькулятор использует 0, чтобы расчет не ломался. Берется из input field или runtime variable; дальше используется во всех формулах.
Source / Input: User input values, runtime variables, calculator helper functions
Output / Goes To: Normalized values used by all formula blocks

Formula: ROUND(value, 2 decimals)
Описание логики расчета: Промежуточные денежные и расчетные значения округляются до 2 знаков после запятой для внутреннего результата. Берется расчетное значение; дальше идет в totals, item result и breakdown.
Source / Input: User input values, runtime variables, calculator helper functions
Output / Goes To: Normalized values used by all formula blocks

Formula: CEILING(Raw Price, Rounding Increment)
Описание логики расчета: Итоговая цена для клиента округляется вверх до ближайшего шага округления. Сейчас шаг округления = $10 из settings.rounding. Берется raw price; результат идет в Estimate Document и Cost Breakdown.
Source / Input: User input values, runtime variables, calculator helper functions
Output / Goes To: Normalized values used by all formula blocks

Formula: NormalizeZoneName(Zip Dictionary[Pickup ZIP])
Описание логики расчета: Pickup ZIP из Quote Draft ищется в ZIP dictionary, затем приводится к canonical zone: например NYC -> NY Area. Результат используется для route distance, pickup local distance и route label.
Source / Input: Quote Draft pickup/delivery ZIP, ZIP dictionary, distance matrix
Output / Goes To: Pickup zone, delivery zone, route support, pickup/delivery/interstate distances

Formula: NormalizeZoneName(Zip Dictionary[Delivery ZIP])
Описание логики расчета: Delivery ZIP из Quote Draft ищется в ZIP dictionary, затем приводится к canonical zone: например CA (LA) -> CA South. Результат используется для route distance, delivery local distance и route label.
Source / Input: Quote Draft pickup/delivery ZIP, ZIP dictionary, distance matrix
Output / Goes To: Pickup zone, delivery zone, route support, pickup/delivery/interstate distances

Formula: Distance Matrix[Pickup Zone][Delivery Zone]
Описание логики расчета: Калькулятор берет canonical pickup zone и delivery zone, затем ищет расстояние в distance matrix. Если расстояние найдено, routeSupported = TRUE. Результат идет в interstate fuel, vehicle cost, driver cost и final route cost.
Source / Input: Quote Draft pickup/delivery ZIP, ZIP dictionary, distance matrix
Output / Goes To: Pickup zone, delivery zone, route support, pickup/delivery/interstate distances

Formula: Distance Matrix[Pickup Zone][Pickup Zone]
Описание логики расчета: Для pickup stage используется среднее локальное расстояние внутри pickup zone. Берется из distance matrix по pickup zone -> pickup zone. Результат идет в pickup mileage и pickup labor mileage.
Source / Input: Quote Draft pickup/delivery ZIP, ZIP dictionary, distance matrix
Output / Goes To: Pickup zone, delivery zone, route support, pickup/delivery/interstate distances

Formula: Distance Matrix[Delivery Zone][Delivery Zone]
Описание логики расчета: Для delivery stage используется среднее локальное расстояние внутри delivery zone. Берется из distance matrix по delivery zone -> delivery zone. Результат идет в delivery mileage и delivery labor mileage.
Source / Input: Quote Draft pickup/delivery ZIP, ZIP dictionary, distance matrix
Output / Goes To: Pickup zone, delivery zone, route support, pickup/delivery/interstate distances

Formula: Item Name exists AND Quantity > 0 AND (Physical Volume > 0 OR Total Weight > 0)
Описание логики расчета: Строка item попадает в расчет только если есть название и есть физический объем или вес. Пустые строки и name-only строки не создают цену. Результат идет в список calculatedItems.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: Length(in) x Width(in) x Height(in) / 1728 x Quantity
Описание логики расчета: Физический объем item считается из размеров в inches. Размеры берутся из Quote Draft item row или Quick Quote catalog transfer. Результат идет в item volume, total shipment volume, effective volume и vehicle fit.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need
Used In: Total shipment volume, effective volume, vehicle fit

Formula: SUM(All Item Physical Volumes)
Описание логики расчета: Общий физический объем заказа равен сумме physical volume всех billable items. Результат показывается в summary и используется для Effective $/cu ft.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need
Used In: Summary, effective cost per cu ft

Formula: 1 + Fragile*0.10 + NonStackable*0.25 + Crated*0.15
Описание логики расчета: Калькулятор увеличивает operational volume, если item fragile, non-stackable или crated. Флаги берутся из item row. Результат multiplier идет в effective volume.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: CEILING(Physical Volume x Effective Volume Multiplier)
Описание логики расчета: Effective volume показывает, сколько operational space занимает item с учетом handling complexity. Берется physical volume и flags multiplier. Результат идет в total effective volume, vehicle fit и volume-based stage model.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need
Used In: Vehicle fit, volume model, operational cost

Formula: SUM(All Item Effective Volumes)
Описание логики расчета: Общий effective volume заказа равен сумме effective volume всех billable items. Результат идет в vehicle fit, pickup/interstate/delivery volume model и bulky/direct review recommendation.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: Item Weight x Quantity
Описание логики расчета: Вес item line считается как вес одного предмета, умноженный на количество. Вес берется из Quote Draft item row или catalog default. Результат идет в total shipment weight, warning/crew logic, vehicle fit и weight model.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need
Used In: Total weight, crew logic, weight model

Formula: SUM(All Item Total Weights)
Описание логики расчета: Общий вес заказа равен сумме total weight всех billable items. Результат идет в vehicle fit и weight-based stage model.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: IF(Physical Volume > 0 AND Total Weight = 0, 'Fill up the weight')
Описание логики расчета: Если у item есть объем, но вес не заполнен, калькулятор показывает warning. Это не добавляет цену напрямую, но сигнализирует риск неверной себестоимости.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: IF(Item Weight >= 200, 'Extremely heavy')
Описание логики расчета: Если вес одного item >= 200 lb, система помечает item как extremely heavy. Результат идет в warnings и crewNeed = 2.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: IF(Item Weight >= 100, 'Heavy. 2 people needed')
Описание логики расчета: Если вес item >= 100 lb, система считает, что требуется 2 человека. Результат идет в crewNeed и затем в pickup/delivery labor.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: IF((Length + Width + Height) / 12 >= 11, 'Bulky. 2 people needed')
Описание логики расчета: Если сумма габаритов item в feet >= 11, система считает item bulky и требует 2 человека. Результат идет в crewNeed и labor.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: IF(Warning contains heavy or 2 people, 2, else 1)
Описание логики расчета: Crew need определяется из warning logic. Если item тяжелый или bulky, item crew need = 2, иначе 1. Результат идет в required crew, pickup team и delivery team.
Source / Input: Quote Draft item row, Quick Quote catalog transfer, Item Catalog defaults
Output / Goes To: Billable items, physical volume, effective volume, total weight, warning, crew need

Formula: First Active Vehicle where Total Effective Volume <= Vehicle Volume AND Total Weight <= Vehicle Payload
Описание логики расчета: Калькулятор выбирает первый active vehicle из References Vehicles, который вмещает заказ по volume и payload. Результат идет в pickup/delivery vehicle cost и vehicle display.
Source / Input: Total effective volume, total weight, References Vehicles
Output / Goes To: Selected vehicle and interstate vehicle used by stage costs

Formula: Vehicle by settings.interstateVehicleName, fallback selected vehicle
Описание логики расчета: Для interstate stage используется vehicle из settings.interstateVehicleName. Сейчас baseline = Penske 26 ft. Если vehicle не найден, используется vehicle fit result. Результат идет в interstate fuel, maintenance и driver formulas.
Source / Input: Total effective volume, total weight, References Vehicles
Output / Goes To: Selected vehicle and interstate vehicle used by stage costs

Formula: Packaging Rate x Quantity
Описание логики расчета: Packaging rate берется из packagingRates по выбранному item packaging. Результат идет в item.packagingCost и totals.packaging. Важно: AS-IS per-item packaging не добавляется напрямую в additionalCharges.
Source / Input: Item packaging dropdown, Item Catalog default, packagingRates
Output / Goes To: Item packaging cost and packaging display total

Formula: SUM(Item Packaging Costs) + Packaging Per Shipment
Описание логики расчета: Totals.packaging показывает сумму item packaging plus packagingPerShipment, если есть billable items. Это internal/display metric. В final price AS-IS влияет только packagingPerShipment внутри pickup handling.
Source / Input: Item packaging dropdown, Item Catalog default, packagingRates
Output / Goes To: Item packaging cost and packaging display total

Formula: IF Protection Plan = FVP then Full Coverage else Basic Liability
Описание логики расчета: Broker-facing protectionPlan приводится к legacy insurance type для текущего калькулятора. RV и DV считаются как Basic Liability, FVP как Full Coverage. Результат идет в protectionPlans lookup.
Source / Input: Item protectionPlan field, declaredValue input, protectionPlans
Output / Goes To: Insurance/protection cost and customer-facing protection status

Описание логики расчета: RV / Released Value использует Basic Liability с rate 0 и fixed fee 0. Результат идет в insuranceCost = 0 и не увеличивает final price.
Source / Input: Item protectionPlan field, declaredValue input, protectionPlans
Output / Goes To: Insurance/protection cost and customer-facing protection status

Formula: Declared Value x 0.025 + 15
Описание логики расчета: Если выбран FVP / Full Coverage, калькулятор берет declaredValue из item row, умножает на 2.5% и добавляет fixed fee $15. Результат идет в item.insuranceCost, totals.insurance и serviceCost.
Source / Input: Item protectionPlan field, declaredValue input, protectionPlans
Output / Goes To: Insurance/protection cost and customer-facing protection status

Formula: 0 AS-IS because DV maps to Basic Liability pricing
Описание логики расчета: DV сейчас является capture/confirmation behavior и в pricing считается как Basic Liability. Результат не увеличивает final price; wording идет в Estimate Document как confirmation required.
Source / Input: Item protectionPlan field, declaredValue input, protectionPlans
Output / Goes To: Insurance/protection cost and customer-facing protection status

Formula: Effective Volume x Storage Days x Storage Per Cu Ft Per Day
Описание логики расчета: Storage считается по каждому item: effective volume умножается на storage days и storage rate из settings. Результат идет в totals.storage и additionalCharges.
Source / Input: Item storageDays input, effective volume, storage rate variable
Output / Goes To: Storage cost included in additional charges

Formula: Fuel Current Avg x (1 + Fuel Surcharge % / 100)
Описание логики расчета: Fuel price берется из Fuel Prices reference/runtime storage. Калькулятор добавляет surcharge percent. Результат идет в fuel cost per mile.
Source / Input: Fuel Prices reference/runtime variables and Vehicles reference MPG
Output / Goes To: Fuel cost per mile and per unit mile

Formula: Internal Fuel Price / (Vehicle Calculation MPG or Vehicle MPG)
Описание логики расчета: Fuel cost per mile считается из internal fuel price и vehicle MPG. MPG берется из References Vehicles. Если internal fuel или MPG недоступны, используется vehicle.fuelPerMile fallback.
Source / Input: Fuel Prices reference/runtime variables and Vehicles reference MPG
Output / Goes To: Fuel cost per mile and per unit mile

Formula: Fuel Cost Per Mile / Vehicle Denominator
Описание логики расчета: Для interstate allocation fuel cost per mile делится на vehicle volume, если модель volume, или на vehicle payload, если модель weight. Результат идет в interstate fuel component.
Source / Input: Fuel Prices reference/runtime variables and Vehicles reference MPG
Output / Goes To: Fuel cost per mile and per unit mile

Formula: IF Volume < 80 then 205.57 x Volume / (144.87 + Volume), else 73.13 + 0.5 x (Volume - 80)
Описание логики расчета: Pickup loading time по volume model берется из total effective volume и loading coefficients из settings. Результат идет в pickup labor.
Source / Input: Pickup distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, pickup team, settings
Output / Goes To: Pickup labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, pickup subtotal

Formula: Total Weight x 0.2
Описание логики расчета: Pickup loading time по weight model берется из total shipment weight и per-lb minute coefficient. Результат идет в pickup labor.
Source / Input: Pickup distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, pickup team, settings
Output / Goes To: Pickup labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, pickup subtotal

Formula: Total Effective Volume x 0.5
Описание логики расчета: Delivery unloading time по volume model берется из total effective volume и unloadingPerCuFtMinute. Результат идет в delivery labor.
Source / Input: Delivery distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, delivery team, settings
Output / Goes To: Delivery labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, delivery subtotal

Formula: Total Weight x 0.2
Описание логики расчета: Delivery unloading time по weight model берется из total shipment weight и per-lb minute coefficient. Результат идет в delivery labor.
Source / Input: Delivery distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, delivery team, settings
Output / Goes To: Delivery labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, delivery subtotal

Formula: MAX(Pickup Load Minutes, 40) x Wage Per Minute x Pickup Team + Pickup Wage Per Mile x Pickup Distance x Pickup Team
Описание логики расчета: Pickup labor берет load minutes, minimum loading minutes, wagePerMinute, pickupDistance и pickupTeam. Результат идет в pickupCost и stageBreakdown.pickup.labor.
Source / Input: Pickup distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, pickup team, settings
Output / Goes To: Pickup labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, pickup subtotal

Formula: MAX(Delivery Unload Minutes, 30) x Wage Per Minute x Delivery Team + Pickup Wage Per Mile x Delivery Distance x Delivery Team
Описание логики расчета: Delivery labor берет unload minutes, minimum delivery minutes = minLoadingMinutes - 10, wagePerMinute, deliveryDistance и deliveryTeam. Результат идет в deliveryCost и stageBreakdown.delivery.labor.
Source / Input: Delivery distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, delivery team, settings
Output / Goes To: Delivery labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, delivery subtotal

Formula: Pickup Distance x Vehicle Maintenance Per Mile + Pickup Distance x Fuel Cost Per Mile
Описание логики расчета: Pickup mileage cost берет pickupDistance, selected local vehicle maintenancePerMile и fuelCostPerMile. Результат идет в pickupCost.
Source / Input: Pickup distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, pickup team, settings
Output / Goes To: Pickup labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, pickup subtotal

Formula: Delivery Distance x Vehicle Maintenance Per Mile + Delivery Distance x Fuel Cost Per Mile
Описание логики расчета: Delivery mileage cost берет deliveryDistance, selected local vehicle maintenancePerMile и fuelCostPerMile. Результат идет в deliveryCost.
Source / Input: Delivery distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, delivery team, settings
Output / Goes To: Delivery labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, delivery subtotal

Formula: Amount x Warehouse Handling Rate + Amount x Truck Loading Rate + Packaging Per Shipment
Описание логики расчета: Pickup handling зависит от selected model amount: effective volume или total weight. Rates берутся из settings. Результат идет в pickupCost. PackagingPerShipment включается здесь.
Source / Input: Pickup distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, pickup team, settings
Output / Goes To: Pickup labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, pickup subtotal

Formula: Amount x Warehouse Handling Rate + Amount x Truck Loading Rate / 2
Описание логики расчета: Delivery handling зависит от selected model amount. Truck loading rate делится на 2. Результат идет в deliveryCost.
Source / Input: Delivery distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, delivery team, settings
Output / Goes To: Delivery labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, delivery subtotal

Formula: Management Fee + Dispatch Fee
Описание логики расчета: К pickup stage добавляются fixed managementFee и dispatchFee из settings. Результат идет в pickupCost.
Source / Input: Pickup distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, pickup team, settings
Output / Goes To: Pickup labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, pickup subtotal

Formula: Management Fee + Dispatch Fee
Описание логики расчета: К delivery stage добавляются fixed managementFee и dispatchFee из settings. Результат идет в deliveryCost.
Source / Input: Delivery distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, delivery team, settings
Output / Goes To: Delivery labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, delivery subtotal

Formula: Pickup Mileage + Pickup Labor + Pickup Handling + Management Fee + Dispatch Fee
Описание логики расчета: Pickup subtotal складывает mileage, labor, handling и fixed admin fees. Результат идет в routeCost и stageBreakdown.pickup.total.
Source / Input: Pickup distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, pickup team, settings
Output / Goes To: Pickup labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, pickup subtotal

Formula: Delivery Mileage + Delivery Labor + Delivery Handling + Management Fee + Dispatch Fee
Описание логики расчета: Delivery subtotal складывает mileage, labor, handling и fixed admin fees. Результат идет в routeCost и stageBreakdown.delivery.total.
Source / Input: Delivery distance, selected vehicle, selected model amount, delivery team, settings
Output / Goes To: Delivery labor, mileage, handling, management/dispatch, delivery subtotal

Formula: Amount x Interstate Distance x Vehicle Maintenance Per Unit Mile
Описание логики расчета: Interstate vehicle cost берет selected model amount, interstate distance и maintenance per unit mile у interstate vehicle. Результат идет в interstateCost.
Source / Input: Interstate distance, interstate vehicle, selected model amount, fuel/vehicle settings
Output / Goes To: Interstate fuel, maintenance, driver, interstate subtotal

Formula: Amount x Interstate Distance x Fuel Cost Per Unit Mile
Описание логики расчета: Interstate fuel берет selected model amount, interstate distance и fuel cost per unit mile. Результат идет в interstateCost.
Source / Input: Interstate distance, interstate vehicle, selected model amount, fuel/vehicle settings
Output / Goes To: Interstate fuel, maintenance, driver, interstate subtotal

Formula: Interstate Driver Cost Per Mile / Vehicle Denominator x Interstate Distance x Amount x Interstate Team
Описание логики расчета: Driver cost распределяется по vehicle denominator, distance и selected amount. Interstate team сейчас = 1. Результат идет в interstateCost.
Source / Input: Interstate distance, interstate vehicle, selected model amount, fuel/vehicle settings
Output / Goes To: Interstate fuel, maintenance, driver, interstate subtotal

Formula: Interstate Maintenance + Interstate Fuel + Interstate Driver
Описание логики расчета: Interstate subtotal складывает vehicle cost, fuel и driver. Результат идет в routeCost и stageBreakdown.interstate.total.
Source / Input: Interstate distance, interstate vehicle, selected model amount, fuel/vehicle settings
Output / Goes To: Interstate fuel, maintenance, driver, interstate subtotal

Formula: Amount x Repair Cost Per Unit
Описание логики расчета: Damage surcharge зависит от selected model: repairCostPerCuFt для volume или repairCostPerLb для weight. Результат идет в serviceCost.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: Pickup Cost + Delivery Cost + Interstate Cost + Damage Surcharge + Insurance Cost
Описание логики расчета: Service cost складывает три stage costs, damage surcharge и protection/insurance cost. Результат идет в priceExcludingBrokerFee и operationalCost.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: (Pickup Cost + Delivery Cost + Interstate Cost) x Margin Rate
Описание логики расчета: Margin считается от route stage costs, без storage/access/adjustments. MarginRate берется из settings. Результат идет в priceExcludingBrokerFee.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: Service Cost + Stage Margin
Описание логики расчета: Цена до broker fee складывает service cost и stage margin. Результат идет в brokeredPrice.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: Price Excluding Broker Fee / (1 - Broker Fee Rate)
Описание логики расчета: Broker fee gross-up делит price excluding broker fee на 1 - brokerFeeRate. Сейчас brokerFeeRate = 4%. Результат идет в rawPrice.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: calculateExcelStageCosts(measure = volume, amount = Total Effective Volume)
Описание логики расчета: Калькулятор считает pickup/interstate/delivery модель по effective volume. Результат сравнивается с weight model.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: calculateExcelStageCosts(measure = weight, amount = Total Weight)
Описание логики расчета: Калькулятор считает pickup/interstate/delivery модель по total weight. Результат сравнивается с volume model.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: MAX(Volume Model Price, Weight Model Price)
Описание логики расчета: AS-IS калькулятор выбирает более дорогую модель по priceExcludingBrokerFee. Результат selectedCosts используется для routeCost, serviceCost, rawPrice и finalPrice.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: Selected Pickup Cost + Selected Delivery Cost + Selected Interstate Cost
Описание логики расчета: Route cost складывает pickup, delivery и interstate costs из выбранной volume/weight модели. Результат идет в totals.routeCost и Cost Breakdown.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: COI Fee x Count(COI pickup/delivery points)
Описание логики расчета: Если COI включен на pickup или delivery, добавляется coiFee за каждую точку. Результат идет в accessFees.
Source / Input: Pickup/delivery access fields and access fee variables
Output / Goes To: Access fees included in additional charges

Formula: Stairs Fee Per Floor x MAX(Floor, 1) when Stairs = TRUE
Описание логики расчета: Если legacy stairs flag включен, калькулятор умножает ставку за этаж на floor. Результат идет в accessFees.
Source / Input: Pickup/delivery access fields and access fee variables
Output / Goes To: Access fees included in additional charges

Formula: Narrow Access Fee when NarrowAccess = TRUE OR ElevatorUnavailable = TRUE
Описание логики расчета: Если narrowAccess или elevatorUnavailable true, добавляется narrowAccessFee. Результат идет в accessFees.
Source / Input: Pickup/delivery access fields and access fee variables
Output / Goes To: Access fees included in additional charges

Formula: CEILING(Long Carry Ft / 50) x Long Carry Fee Per 50 Ft
Описание логики расчета: Long carry считается блоками по 50 ft с округлением вверх. Результат идет в accessFees.
Source / Input: Pickup/delivery access fields and access fee variables
Output / Goes To: Access fees included in additional charges

Formula: Pickup Access Fees + Delivery Access Fees
Описание логики расчета: Access fees суммируют COI, stairs, narrow/elevatorUnavailable и long carry по pickup и delivery. Результат идет в additionalCharges.
Source / Input: Pickup/delivery access fields and access fee variables
Output / Goes To: Access fees included in additional charges

Formula: IF Priority Date = TRUE, Priority Date Fee, 0
Описание логики расчета: В коде есть optionFees для priorityDate, но текущий UI принудительно сохраняет priorityDate = false. Если true, результат идет в additionalCharges.
Source / Input: Quote options and runtime option variables
Output / Goes To: Option fee or operational-cost display impact

Formula: IF Exclusive Delivery = TRUE, Service Cost x Exclusive Delivery Multiplier, else Service Cost
Описание логики расчета: В коде operationalCost может умножаться на exclusiveDeliveryMultiplier. Текущий UI принудительно сохраняет exclusiveDelivery = false. Результат используется как internal operationalCost display.
Source / Input: Quote options and runtime option variables
Output / Goes To: Option fee or operational-cost display impact

Formula: IF Extra Labor People > 0 AND Extra Labor Hours > 0, People x Hours x Rate, else 0
Описание логики расчета: Special labor берет people, hours и hidden/internal rate из quote.options. Default rate = $50/hour. Результат идет в quoteAdjustment и final price, только если есть billable items.
Source / Input: Special labor fields and legacy manual adjustment
Output / Goes To: Quote adjustment added to raw price

Formula: MAX(Manual Adjustment, 0)
Описание логики расчета: Legacy manualAdjustment сохраняется для старых drafts/snapshots. Новые broker adjustments должны использовать Special Labor. Результат идет в quoteAdjustment.
Source / Input: Special labor fields and legacy manual adjustment
Output / Goes To: Quote adjustment added to raw price

Formula: Storage + Access Fees + Option Fees
Описание логики расчета: Additional charges складывают storage, accessFees и optionFees. Результат добавляется к brokeredPrice в rawPrice.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: Special Labor Cost + Legacy Manual Adjustment
Описание логики расчета: Quote adjustment складывает special labor и legacy manual adjustment. Результат добавляется к rawPrice.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: Brokered Price + Additional Charges + Quote Adjustment
Описание логики расчета: Raw price — цена до финального округления. Берется brokeredPrice, additionalCharges и quoteAdjustment. Результат идет в final price rounding.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: MAX(0, Raw Price - Operational Cost - Additional Charges - Quote Adjustment)
Описание логики расчета: Internal margin display считается как остаток после operationalCost, additionalCharges и adjustments. Результат показывается в Cost Breakdown, но не в customer Estimate Document.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: IF Billable Items exist, CEILING(Raw Price, 10), else 0
Описание логики расчета: Final customer price равен raw price, округленному вверх до $10, если есть billable items. Если billable items нет, итог = $0. Результат идет в Estimate Document, My Estimates и Cost Breakdown.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: Final Customer Price - Raw Price
Описание логики расчета: Rounding delta показывает, сколько добавило округление. Результат идет в totals.roundingDelta для audit.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: IF Total Shipment Volume > 0, Final Customer Price / Total Shipment Volume, else 0
Описание логики расчета: Effective $/cu ft — internal metric для broker/admin review. Берется finalPrice и totalVolume. Не влияет на цену.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: IF Total Weight > 0 then Weight else IF Total Effective Volume > 0 then Effective Volume else None
Описание логики расчета: Калькулятор выбирает метод распределения final price по items: сначала weight share, иначе effective volume share. Это internal allocation metric.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: IF Weight method, Final Price x Item Weight / Total Weight; else Final Price x Item Effective Volume / Total Effective Volume
Описание логики расчета: Item Ref. Price распределяет итоговую цену по items для internal unit economics. Не влияет на final price и не должен использоваться как declared value.
Source / Input: Selected stage costs, service cost, additional charges, broker fee, rounding
Output / Goes To: Raw price, margin display, final customer price, item allocation

Formula: formulaVersion + variablesSnapshot + quote + result
Описание логики расчета: При Generate Estimate система сохраняет frozen snapshot: formulaVersion, variablesSnapshot, quote и result. Результат нужен, чтобы старые estimates не пересчитывались после изменения variables.
Source / Input: Generated estimate snapshot: formulaVersion, variablesSnapshot, quote, result
Output / Goes To: Frozen estimate audit trail
